product.name: Cast Iron Table Mount Meat Grinder- Manual Mincer Includes Two 3/4" Cutting Disks & Sausage Stuffer Funnel, Heavy Duty Construction- Make Homemade Ground Beef Burgers, Easy Use Cooking Tool Must Have
product.description: Make fresh and healthy burgers and loaves by grinding your own meat. CucinaPro meat grinder was designed with the home user in mind. Easy to use with medium and coarse cutting disks and sausage stuffing funnel. This versatile kitchen tool can be used for chopping all kinds of vegetables and fresh or dried fruits. Made of heavy cast iron, meat grinder is durable and will stand the test of time. Table clamp will attach to any table or counter ledge. You will never buy frozen burger patties again!
features: Two 2-3/4-inch disks and sausage stuffing funnel
No clamp mount included; Must be mounted to a secure fixture
